property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\raymo\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Users\raymo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python39;C:\Program Files\Go\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\raymo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python39;C:\Users\raymo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\raymo\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\raymo\go\bin;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;raymo\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\raymo\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\raymo\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: testSignupStudentSuccessful
